title: Liveblocks Pricing
note: Free 500 rooms/mo, 10 conn/room. Pro $30/mo + $0.03/room overage. Team $600/mo. Pricing is per room, not per MAU.

title: Liveblocks Limits
note: LiveObject 2 MB total, broadcast event 32 MB (v≥3.14).

title: Yjs Internals — overhead characteristics
note: Metadata cost correlates with #ops, not content length. Version vector ~4 KB. Copy/paste creates at most 2 Item objects.

title: Scalability of y-websocket server — Yjs Community
note: ~100 KB memory per small doc; scale horizontally via Redis pub/sub or y-redis streams; sticky sessions recommended.

title: Node.js + WebSockets: ws vs socket.io
note: ws ≈ 3 KB/conn memory; socket.io ≈ 15 KB/conn; ws 50K+ conns/server; socket.io gives rooms/namespaces/reconnect for free.

title: Building realtime apps with WebSockets
note: Deployment patterns for long-lived WS outside FaaS.

title: Socket.IO 2026 edition guide
note: Current patterns; rooms API matches our board:{id}/section:{id} channel keys.

title: CRDTs go brrr — Joseph Gentle
note: CRDT perf context for Yjs vs alternatives.

title: Vercel Functions docs
note: No long-lived WebSockets in Functions — a self-hosted WS option needs a persistent Node process outside Vercel. Relevant to 자체 WS candidate.
